item.title: this is what pure love looks like
item.dc:creator: Parnommenc

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1262 (peasant energy drink)
item.description:
Let us rise up and take our daily bread.
Well, the "economic war" is on, which means everyone loses.
Every time I see this meme, I wonder why nobody has made a Linear A and a Linear B version, but I don't have the energy.
I. I don't know how I feel about this.
Remember, the people causing these troubles, as well as the climate catastrophe we are in are not your neighbor: they are billionaires, and they are people with names, addresses, and they can die.
I was PISSED at the priest this morning in the little local mission parish. Yesterday had the perfect epistle reading and gospel reading combo to talk about how to fight fascism. Instead, he quoted Saint John Chrysostom, who basically said when faced with evil rulers, to basically deal with it because there's nothing you can do. Or something? Bullshit. Yeah, sure, fine. If you're a popular enough Bishop, you get exiled to a backwater province on the Black Sea, where the climate kills you anyway, but that is not an option for us. (I will have to see the video of the priest in my normal parish to see if He did a better job. He normally does.)
Someone needs to fix this fucking timeline, stat.
Big mood.
Or I'll happily marry someone outside of America, I would love to get out of here, portal or no portal.
As well as 2025 as a whole.
Are you fleeing the country or your home state for Reasons? Are you passing through Arizona? My apartment is open to you for a safe port in your journey. I ain't gonna tell anyone shit. Not only is it a safe port of call, I can even provide you some Port to drink, if that's your jam. (I, however, do not have any jam, I need to go grocery shopping today before things get much more expensive).
Oh. Oh dear.
The only series I know that sort of touches on this is The Magicians, specifically book 3. Any other reccomendations?
Sorry, too busy witnessing horrors I comprehend all too clearly as a historian.
Honestly this is about what I'd expect to happen.
At this point, if one of these fellas manifested to me, I'd just go, "Oh, Okay I guess this is what it is now."
This and Picard saying "Damage Report" are my life now, I guess.
It's so hard to read right now.
Our original primal instincts are to tell stories, sit around glowing fire, paint on rocks, and help one another.
You now are singing this song under your breath.
I'm gonna dissociate after I post this before I go grocery shopping.
Cool, always wanted a handbasket.
It usually is
Yeah big mood.
Yussssss
That's right, Canadian and European folks, marrying me would be a better life decision than a Cybertruck.
For all my ace homies.
Hahahha
Ho ho ho, merry Crisis.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Thank you. Breeep."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: The final survivor
item.description: Who's hunting who? For those curious about the sauce, it's from Jaydaddy on Youtube.
item.dc:creator: Zapathasura

item.title: Hamburg, Feb. 1, 2025, protest against all that brown muck.
item.description: Remember that post about the demo I went on? Well, this was two days later; 80k people. Clip source: https://bsky.app/profile/marcolarousse.bsky.social/post/3lh4yaetuk22k Lyrics: "Wehrt euch, leistet Widerstand gegen den Faschismus hier im Land. Haltet fest zusammen, haltet fest zusammen..." Translation: "Resist, put up resistance against the fascism here in the country. Stand together strongly, stand together strongly, ..." ...but those lyrics are apparently still evolving. A while back it was still "Onto the barricades!" https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T6i58D2gN8Y
item.dc:creator: MyLastAccountWasShadowbanned

item.title: Happy 131st Birthday Norman Rockwell! - "The Young Lady with the Shiner", 1953. Oil on canvas.
item.description:
The Saturday Evening Post - May 23, 1953 issue.
Reference photography for "The Young Lady with the Shiner" Rockwell often used neighborhood children and friends as his models.
The Runaway, 1958. Cover illustration for The Saturday Evening Post, September 20, 1958. Oil on canvas.
Rosie the Riveter, 1943. Cover illustration for The Saturday Evening Post, published on May 29, 1943.
The Problem We All Live With - 1964
Rockwell - 1921 Born: February 3, 1894, New York, NY Died: November 8, 1978 (age 84 years), Stockbridge, MA
item.dc:creator: tolson9

item.title: This protest needs to be 4 years long
item.description: Plan ahead FP edit. It’s going to be a very long 4 years so don’t be disheartened, trust me, you might not see it but it DOES make a difference. Their goal will be to hide their fear of a popular uprising and any accommodations they make will unlikely be public. The protests will need to be frequent and long. Be prepared. https://imgur.com/gallery/PbOEhAc. But be peaceful. And God speed.
item.dc:creator: killbillsexwife

item.title: Tim Curry’s great love that got away :(
item.dc:creator: NRiNR1

item.title: Can I Offer You Memes In These Trying Times?
item.description:
Wait, this wasn't the inauguration?
Okay unironically imagine a hedgehog big as a sauropod, that would be terrifying
I love this meme but... who is "her"?
Ah, Florida man.
Imagine getting Isekaied by the self-driving butter truck.
They are factually incorrect, Antarctica is the answer for many things.
Considering there is a town named "Climax" this isn't surprising information.
Dude is not a baby, that is a teen living in his parents basement.
If you've washed dishes, you'll understand.
I own three cats, this is correct.
I don't got a blurb for this it's just funny.
Sorry British people but your tea game is weak.
Apologies if the blurbs aren't very good I'm typing with one hand due to a recent surgery, but I hope you still enjoyed, and have a good day!
item.dc:creator: KidKrominator

item.title: We gotta get the fuck outta here
item.description: Just casually begging my Canadian boyfriend of 6 years to finally get us the fuck out of the US. Never been proud to be an American at any point in my life, but now this shit is just downright humiliating and terrifying. And it makes me mad seeing what the US Gov't is doing to the US-Canada relationship. Only weeks after Canada sent firefighers to LA, no less. He's been saying he wants to move us to Canada someday once we get married, but now we are thinking we need to expedite that process and start preparing to leave. We will probably start looking at options this week for securing myself a visa because we can't take this insanity any longer. Fingers crossed.
item.dc:creator: ThereAreChameleonsEverywhereProbably

item.title: Memes vol 485 Boobie
item.description:
Another edition of memes my boyfriend and I have sent each other. Ohhhhhhhh I want tacos so bad
This is what I can only imagine when he and his best friend go camping
THIS IS OUTDATED I can now drive
I want a possum so bad and he’s Mexican
Oh this is really sad now
When he came on our screen with his long hair we both GASPED
I’d feed him beans
DEAR GOD WHY DOES IT HAVE TO BE FAMILY GUY
I’m a chompy lady
:(
Nessie tax
Pickles- rest in peace evil Prince
Big Mama tax

item.title: Something Different Sunday, various artworks for your pleasure.
item.description:
If you don't know, I spend what some could say is an unhealthy amount of time looking for cool werewolf artwork. But I also see and appreciate the art of other subjects of almost any kind. So today, I present something different! Today, I gotchu some: ambassadors of death, infantry, the heat, magic, dragons, furry beasts, and Bohemiaw Rhapsody. I've tried the alternative x links, I can't get them to work consistently. Until I can guarantee artist credit, you may alter the link on your own accord. https://www.artstation.com/artwork/5WnN0J
https://www.artstation.com/nimgaladh https://x.com/nimgaladh/status/1884317275270046043?t=-B7ngTFMMEHRchwRYTloMw&s=19
https://bsky.app/profile/latencyknight.bsky.social/post/3lgoessc3y22v
https://bsky.app/profile/egil-egregious.bsky.social/post/3lgn7dn3c2k24
https://www.furaffinity.net/view/59678774/
https://www.furaffinity.net/view/59309328/
https://bsky.app/profile/breathlesshunt.bsky.social/post/3lghnoa6sr22u
https://bsky.app/profile/trenchcrusade.bsky.social/post/3lgqeoj5tgk2w
Is it Halloween yet? https://www.artstation.com/brooklynsmithart https://x.com/mikren_/status/1841364377137471804?t=vjpr8EB0yKKpF1VFl-BuVA&s=19
https://bsky.app/profile/safiru.bsky.social/post/3ldwjzkbjbk2h
https://www.artstation.com/artwork/Qn5zJB
https://www.deviantart.com/barladera https://x.com/barladera/status/1860394626508538320?t=0JCObi1dnmJibdarX1v26g&s=19
https://bsky.app/profile/saturnacat.bsky.social/post/3lgnkrsqkq22q
https://bsky.app/profile/hyroe.bsky.social https://x.com/_Hyroe_/status/1881766705795620960?t=E-IMqa2ADZrt8mTd0MEn9w&s=19
https://www.artstation.com/artwork/oR4q4
https://x.com/WolfdawgArt/status/1868790364494266834?t=2mv1H414uZTzD5u9I5v72Q&s=19
Hey, Solider. https://bsky.app/profile/txnshii0.bsky.social/post/3lh2v3zhywc2l
https://www.furaffinity.net/view/58561493/
Snack time. https://bsky.app/profile/nywolforg.bsky.social/post/3lh7de7wfmm2u
You may have seen this already, but it's too much fun not to see it again! https://x.com/Bonnymama7/status/1884668339563487278?t=qzOrsUK16JIKwW903pehMg&s=19
https://bsky.app/profile/tomotiso2k.bsky.social https://x.com/Tomotiso2k/status/1886035175118876683?t=GRGlb5EGRgOnVue4XKhiSA&s=19

Don't have a cow man, unless you're a werewolf. But either way, werewolves every day! Join us whenever you're howling for some! https://www.furaffinity.net/user/rysiakarakal/ https://x.com/MoriMersMortuar/status/1885404803771027470?t=i3YoprwMdMvSbKzL-pzjRw&s=19
